title: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Egypt makes history as Saudi Arabia, Tunisia falter

snapshot.title: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Egypt makes history as Saudi Arabia, Tunisia falter
snapshot.description: Egypt beat New Zealand 3-1 for their first World Cup win in history Egypt earned the first World Cup win in their history by beating New Zealand 3-1 on Sunday, putting them on track to reach the knockout round for the first time. Mohamed Salah, Mostafa Zico and Trezeguet were Egypt’s scorers after Finn Surman had given New Zealand the lead after 15 minutes of the Group G match
snapshot.author: Agencies
snapshot.pageTitle: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Egypt makes history as Saudi Arabia, Tunisia falter | Arab News
